title: exemption of the existing models of buses with seating capacity 13 or more passengers excluding driver from the purview of sub-rule (1) of rule 125C of CMVR

[No. RT-11028/02/2013-MVL]. ABHAY DAMLE, Jt. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
